cards.practiceDesc: Practice reading Hiragana and Katakana characters to build your foundation.
cards.statsDesc: Track your learning progress, accuracy, and see how much you've improved.
cards.canvasDesc: Practice writing Japanese characters freely on a digital canvas.
cards.kanjiDesc: Explore JLPT levels, check Kanji details, and initiate practice sessions based on meaning.
cards.numbersDesc: Learn and practice reading Japanese numbers and counting systems.
cards.vocabularyDesc: Learn and practice reading Japanese vocabulary.
cards.settingsDesc: Customise quiz length, accent colour, mastery thresholds, and more.

appearance.title: Appearance Settings
appearance.accentColorDesc: Choose a theme color for the entire application

quiz.title: Quiz Settings
quiz.lengthDesc: How many questions appear in a single quiz session
quiz.typesDesc: Choose which question formats appear in your quiz. At least one must remain enabled.
quiz.lastTypeWarning: At least one type must remain enabled

typeDescs.romaji: See a kana character, pick the correct rōmaji reading
typeDescs.kana: See a rōmaji reading, pick the correct kana character
typeDescs.sequence: See a rōmaji word, arrange individual kana in the right order
typeDescs.pair: See a rōmaji pair, select the matching kana pair
typeDescs.drawing: See a rōmaji prompt, draw the kana character freehand
typeDescs.listening: Listen to the word and select the correct one

quiz.hintsDesc: Show readings on cards during quiz (classic mode)

general.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset EVERYTHING? This will wipe all progress and settings.

practice.weakestDesc: How many characters to include when practicing 'Weakest' sets

practice.weakestDesc: How many characters to include when practicing 'Weakest' sets
